concept: My Other Car is a Pile of Parts
title: Funny Mechanic Quote Shirt - My Other Car Is a Pile of Parts, Auto Repair Gift, Gearhead Humor Tee
description:
Here’s to the automotive tinkerers and grease monkeys who see beauty in bolts and a story in every scratch. If your dream car is currently in its ‘hope and dreams’ phase (read: a pile of parts in the garage), this design is your badge of honor. Whether you’re a weekend wrench enthusiast or the unofficial go-to mechanic for family and friends, celebrate your love for all things gear-driven with this hilarious and relatable graphic.

Perfect for:
- Weekend warriors restoring their dream car one paycheck at a time
- Mechanics who like to laugh while they work
- Gearheads, hot rod enthusiasts, and DIY car project lovers
- Gifts for Father’s Day, your local grease guru, or anyone who smells like gasoline

DETAILS:
- Playful automotive-inspired quote design: 'My Other Car is a Pile of Parts’
- Bold mechanical typography and minimal illustration (no-nonsense, just like car people)
- Made-to-order in a full range of light and dark colors to suit every gearhead’s garage vibe.

100% Airlume combed and ring-spun cotton (Bella Canvas 3001) — lightweight 4.2 oz/yd² (142 g/m²) for breathability
Retail crew neckline with ribbed knit collar and shoulder tape for shape retention
Side seams and tear-away label for fit stability and comfort
Vibrant, crisp printing: DTF or DTG depending on provider for detailed sleeve/label prints
Ethically sourced/REACH certified; blank product sourced from Honduras; multiple fabric blends for heathered colors

Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)
Non-chlorine: bleach as needed
Tumble dry: low heat
Iron, steam or dry: medium heat
Do not dryclean

Shipped by BanterWearCo. Questions? Message me — I respond faster than a teenager asked to take out the trash. (Low bar, admittedly.)
